channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Santa Clarita, California, Under Shelter-In-Place Order as Max Fire Erupts
Pollster Allocco: Economy Improving, GOP Still Faces Midterm Challenge
item.description: Pollster Patrick Allocco told Newsmax that better economic data and potential Iran peace deals could shift the political landscape.

item.title: Trump Denies Reports of U.S. Paying Millions to Iran
item.description: President Donald Trump rejected claims that the U.S. will pay Iran millions as part of a ceasefire agreement in a Monday post.

item.title: Sen. Cruz: Texas GOP Must Unite Behind Paxton
item.description: Sen. Ted Cruz told Newsmax that Texas Republicans are rallying behind Attorney General Ken Paxton after the GOP primary.
